pi_items.source: verifier.py checks visible_span and retention >= 86400000 seconds (1000 days)
noto_earthquake.xml contains the text '2024 Noto Peninsula, Japan Earthquake'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real earthquake data (2024 Noto Peninsula) from the USGS catalog (event us6000m0xl). The verifier strictly requires a screenshot to be saved to /home/ga/scmv_noto_map.png. It checks that both 'events.visibleTimeSpan' and 'events.retention' configuration values are set to at least 86,400,000 seconds (1000 days) to display the historical earthquake.
